2342550.name: TOONCOP
2342550.description:
Play for Free. Survive the Cartoon Apocalypse.

Tooncop is a fast-paced, first-person horde shooter prototype where you take on waves of chaotic, rogue cartoon enemies spilling into the real world.

There’s no pay-to-win, no microtransactions, and no cosmetic grinding—just raw arcade-style gameplay focused on survival, score chasing, and moment-to-moment chaos.

Each run gives you 15 minutes to survive increasingly aggressive enemy waves, collect XP, chain power-ups, and push for high scores. The game is designed to be simple, snappy, and satisfying—with a growing emphasis on muscle memory and flow state combat.

Whether you're testing your reflexes or just blasting rogue Pomchis for fun, Tooncop is all about gameplay first.

💡 This is an early prototype created by a solo developer. Expect frequent updates, new maps, and evolving mechanics as the project grows.

Play now for free on Steam and help shape what comes next.
